iotevents.alarmmodel.sns.CfnAbout: Information required to publish the Amazon SNS message.

iotevents.alarmmodel.sns.Payload.Description: You can configure the action payload when you send a message as an Amazon SNS push notification.

iotevents.alarmmodel.sns.TargetArn.Description: The ARN of the Amazon SNS target where the message is sent.
